title: Analytics Explorer
subtitle: Build custom tables and time-series charts from customer, financial, and consumption data.

basis.label: I want to see data...
basis.noMetrics: No data products available for this view.

noMetricsSelected: Choose a basis above, then select data products and click Run Query.
noData: No data matches the current filters.

benchmark.title: Average Consumption by Customer Type
benchmark.help: Compares average consumption across customer types by day/week/month/year. Denominator includes all connected customers in scope, including zero-use customers.
benchmark.noData: No benchmark data matches current filters.
benchmark.selectPortfolioHint: Select a portfolio in the header to run portfolio scope.

transactions.title: Transactions Time Series
transactions.help: Explore transactions over time aggregated or disaggregated by site, customer type, portfolio, country, or transaction type.

hourlyExport.title: Download Raw Hourly Consumption
hourlyExport.help: Export hourly kWh readings (one row per account, meter, and hour) as CSV, using the Country / Sites / Customer Types filters above. Timestamps are UTC. Max range 400 days.
